facts.title: Closest Habitable Candidate
facts.body: Proxima Centauri b is the closest potentially habitable planet in this snapshot at 4.2 light-years away.

facts.title: Planets Within 20 Light-Years
facts.body: This MVP catalog includes 3 confirmed planets and 7 nearby stars within 20 light-years.

facts.title: Voyager-Scale Travel
facts.body: At Voyager 1 speed, reaching Proxima Centauri would take about 74,886 years.

facts.title: Brightness Is Not Closeness
facts.body: Sirius A is the brightest nearby star in this snapshot, while Proxima Centauri is the closest.

facts.title: Red Dwarfs Dominate
facts.body: 4 of 7 stars within 20 light-years are cool M-type red dwarfs.

facts.title: Star of the Day
facts.body: Barnard's Star has the fastest apparent motion in the nearby-star snapshot at 10.36 arcseconds per year.
